title: Profile Card
description: Schema for .github/profile-card.json — repos that include this file will appear on the GitHub profile README.

name.description: Display name shown in bold, e.g. 'bodh (বোধ)'

short_desc.description: One-liner description shown in the table row.

long_desc.description: Longer description rendered inside a collapsible <details> block (markdown/HTML supported). Default collapsed. Omit to show no collapsible section.

logo.description: Theme-aware logo URLs (raw GitHub URLs recommended).

dark.description: Logo URL for dark mode (transparent background recommended).

light.description: Logo URL for light mode (solid background recommended).

alt.description: Alt text for the logo image.

priority.description: Sort order — lower number appears first. Default: 99.
